content: add up all lines of code within each .py file in this directory

COMMAND: wc -l ./*.py
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
now print out which of the .py files had the most lines of code

COMMAND: wc -l ./*.py | sort -rn | sed -n '2p'
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
list the permissions for each file in this directory

COMMAND: ls -l
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
print every line in each of the python files in this directory that start with the word import

COMMAND: grep "^import" ./*.py
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
print the cpu architecture and available caches on this device

COMMAND: uname -m && sysctl hw.l1dcachesize hw.l1icachesize hw.l2cachesize hw.cachesize
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
show which process is currently taking up the most ram on the device

COMMAND: ps aux | sort -k4 -rn | head -5
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
whats the ip address and mac address of this device

COMMAND: ifconfig en0 | grep -E "inet |ether"
CONFIDENCE: high
WARNING: none
